sections.paragraph:
m. (but fem. Isa 43:6), pr. whatever is situated on the right (compare יָמַן, יָמִין), hence-

(1) the southern quarter (opp. to שְׂמאֹל which see), Job 9:9. תֵּימָנָה towards the south, southward, Exo 26:18, 35 Exo 26:35 27:9 . Poet. for the south wind (fully רוּחַ הַתֵּימָן), Psa 78:26 Son 4:16. Compare צָפֹון.

(2) [Teman], pr.n. of a city, country, and people eastward of Idumea, taking their origin from תֵּימָן the grandson of Esau, Gen 36:11, 15 Gen 36:15 Jerem. 49:7 , 20 Jer 49:20 Eze 25:13 Hab 3:3 Oba 1:9 and like the rest of the Arabs ( 1Ki 5:11), they were famed for wisdom, Jer 49:7 Oba 1:9 Bar_3:22 , 23 comp. Job 2:11 22:1 . Patron. תֵּימָנִי Job loc. cit. Gen 36:34. But תֵּימְנִי 1Ch 4:6, is different, being derived from some unknown town, תֵּימֵן.
